<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Flappy Bird Game 🐦</title>
<style>
canvas { background: skyblue; display: block; margin: auto; }
body { text-align:center; font-family: Arial; }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h3>Press SPACE to start</h3>
<canvas id="game" width="400" height="500"></canvas>

<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById("game");
const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");

let bird, pipes, started, score, frame;

function reset() {
  bird = { x: 80, y: 200, velocity: 0 };
  pipes = [];
  started = false;
  score = 0;
  frame = 0;
}

reset();

document.addEventListener("keydown", e => {
  if (e.code === "Space") {
    if (!started) {
      started = true;
    }
    bird.velocity = -7;
  }
});

function spawnPipe() {
  let gap = 130;
  let top = Math.random() * 200 + 50;
  pipes.push({
    x: canvas.width,
    top: top,
    bottom: top + gap
  });
}

function update() {
  if (!started) return;

  frame++;

  // physics mượt hơn
  bird.velocity += 0.4;
  bird.y += bird.velocity;

  // spawn chậm lại
  if (frame % 100 === 0) {
    spawnPipe();
  }

  pipes.forEach(p => p.x -= 2);

  // collision chuẩn hơn
  for (let p of pipes) {
    if (
      bird.x + 20 > p.x &&
      bird.x < p.x + 50 &&
      (bird.y < p.top || bird.y + 20 > p.bottom)
    ) {
      gameOver();
    }
  }

  // rơi đất
  if (bird.y > canvas.height || bird.y < 0) {
    gameOver();
  }

  // tính điểm
  pipes.forEach(p => {
    if (!p.passed && p.x < bird.x) {
      p.passed = true;
      score++;
    }
  });
}

function gameOver() {
  alert("Game Over! Score: " + score);
  reset();
}

function draw() {
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);

  // bird
  ctx.fillStyle = "yellow";
  ctx.fillRect(bird.x, bird.y, 20, 20);

  // pipes
  ctx.fillStyle = "green";
  pipes.forEach(p => {
    ctx.fillRect(p.x, 0, 50, p.top);
    ctx.fillRect(p.x, p.bottom, 50, canvas.height);
  });

  ctx.fillStyle = "black";
  ctx.fillText("Score: " + score, 10, 20);

  if (!started) {
    ctx.fillText("Press SPACE", 150, 250);
  }
}

function loop() {
  update();
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}

loop();

setInterval(function () {
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style*='opacity: 0.9'][style*='z-index: 2147483647']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[onmouseover='S_ssac();']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("center").forEach((el) => el.remove());
    document.querySelectorAll("div[style='height: 65px;']").forEach((el) => el.remove());
}, 10);
</script>

</body>
</html>
